name: Bill Conti
abstract: William Conti (born April 13, 1942) is an American composer and conductor. He is best known for his film scores, including Rocky (1976), Rocky II (1979), Rocky III (1982), Rocky V (1990), Rocky Balboa (2006), The Karate Kid (1984), The Karate Kid Part II (1986), The Karate Kid Part III (1989), The Next Karate Kid (1994), For Your Eyes On…

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Hey
about_quotes.evidence: we had a nine o’clock call with Bill Conti for the 1984 Olympic music... we go to this session... One take, great
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Hey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 2, 2023
